ddls:
CREATE TABLE "turbine_performance" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the recorded data */,
  "active_power" REAL /* Active power output of the turbine in kilowatts */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "theoretical_power" REAL /* Theoretical power output based on the power curve in kilowatt-hours */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the turbine the data is for */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature at the time of data recording */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity at the time of data recording */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at the time of data recording */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the turbine is under maintenance */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if there are any active alerts for the turbine */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turbine_performance_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turbines" (
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turbine */,
  "turbine_name" TEXT /* Name of the turbine */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the turbine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the turbine */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the turbine was installed */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wind farm where the turbine is located */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the turbine */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the turbine */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty for the turbine expires */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the turbine (e.g., operational, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turbine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turbines_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES wind_farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_curves" (
  "curve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power curve entry */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the turbine the curve applies to */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "power_output" REAL /* Corresponding power output in kilowatts */,
  "curve_type" TEXT /* Type of power curve (e.g., nominal, adjusted) */,
  "curve_description" TEXT /* Description of the power curve */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date from which the power curve is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date until which the power curve is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curve_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_curves_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the turbine that was serviced */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance work */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled service */,
  "service_duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance service in hours */,
  "service_cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for the maintenance service */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Company or individual who performed the service */,
  "service_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the service (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, technician, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Specific data or reports accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_timestamp FOREIGN KEY ("timestamp") REFERENCES turbine_performance ("timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the wind farm */,
  "operational_date" TEXT /* Date the wind farm became operational */,
  "total_turbines" INTEGER /* Total number of turbines in the wind farm */,
  "total_capacity" REAL /* Total installed capacity of the wind farm in kilowatts */,
  "annual_energy_production" REAL /* Annual energy production of the wind farm in kilowatt-hours */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance activities */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact metrics (e.g., CO2 reduction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the turbine the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, maintenance) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the report was reviewed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, archived) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the turbine the alert is for */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., performance, maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who acknowledged the alert */,
  "acknowledged_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was acknowledged */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert resolution (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_acknowledged_by FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the role */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the permission */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the role-permission mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role-permission mapping was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the role-permission mapping */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role-permission mapping was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
